message: test(conformance): add DataFrame packet parity gates

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+packet_id: FP-P2D-133

+  critical_drift_budget: 0
+  non_critical_drift_budget_percent: 0.1

+  allowlisted_divergence_categories: null
+machine_check:
+  suite: phase2c_packets
+  require_fixture_count_at_least: 5
+  require_failed: 0
